parameters.query: =INSERT INTO content_items (title, url, source_type, original_content, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.url }}', '{{ $json.source_type }}', '{{ $json.original_content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'processing') RETURNING id

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 800, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B content writer creating LinkedIn posts for ColdIQ, a GTM agency. Write engaging, professional LinkedIn posts that drive engagement and position ColdIQ as a thought leader. Use short paragraphs, line breaks between ideas, and a strong hook opener. No hashtags unless highly relevant. Keep it under 1300 characters.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Create a LinkedIn post based on this article:

Title: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.title + '
URL: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.url + '
Content: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.original_content.substring(0, 2000) + '

Return JSON with: text (the full LinkedIn post including the URL at the end), hook (the opening line), char_count (number). Only valid JSON, no markdown.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 800, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B content writer creating Twitter/X posts for ColdIQ. Write a punchy tweet or short thread (max 3 tweets). Each tweet must be under 280 characters. Be direct, use concrete numbers when possible, no fluff. Make the first tweet a strong standalone hook.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Create a Twitter/X post or short thread based on this article:

Title: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.title + '
URL: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.url + '
Content: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.original_content.substring(0, 2000) + '

Return JSON with: tweets (array of strings, each under 280 chars, include URL in last tweet), hook (the first tweet), tweet_count (number). Only valid JSON, no markdown.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 800, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are writing a brief email newsletter section for ColdIQ's weekly GTM newsletter. Write a 2-3 sentence summary that makes readers want to click through to the full article. Conversational tone, value-focused. Include a clear CTA.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Create a newsletter snippet based on this article:

Title: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.title + '
URL: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.url + '
Content: ' + $('Validate Input').first().json.original_content.substring(0, 2000) + '

Return JSON with: headline (string), body (string, 2-3 sentences max), cta_text (string, e.g. Read the full breakdown). Only valid JSON, no markdown.' }] }) }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE content_items SET status = 'drafts_ready', processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $('Store Content').first().json.id }}
